claims.claim: Sources consist entirely of Microsoft support pages in multiple languages
claims.reasoning: All three agents report this claim and sources 1-3 are Microsoft support pages

claims.claim: Sources contain medical information about acne
claims.reasoning: All three agents report this claim and sources 4-8 contain acne information from US National Institute

claims.claim: Sources contain HPV vaccine effectiveness data
claims.reasoning: All three agents report this claim and sources 9-10 contain HPV vaccine information

claims.claim: Sources contain documentation for a typing test website called Monkeytype

claims.claim: None of the sources contain information about Iceland's domestic politics, governance, economy, trade, labor, society, culture, arts, popular culture, sports, or entertainment
claims.reasoning: All three agents independently report this claim, which is verifiable by examining the sources

claims.claim: Medical information comes from the US National Institute of Arthritis and Musculoskeletal and Skin Diseases

claims.claim: HPV vaccine articles are in Chinese language

claims.claim: Sources are marked as being in Icelandic language
